So those three—Wine Appreciation Class, French Wine Regions Presentation, and Reading a French Label—are all mentioned as ways to appreciate wine. The last one listed is "the possibility to buy wine," which isn't one of the answer choices here. Looking at the options given: (A) French Wine Regions Presentation is listed.
